(use packing-list-builder), or airport navigation (use

description:
Guides the user through writing a complete screenplay from concept through
pitching, chaining 6 atomic skills in the writing category. Covers feature
film, short film, and TV pilot formats with decision points for genre
conventions, adaptation vs. original work, and festival submission vs.
production pitch targeting. Uses screenplay-scene skill for proper screenplay
formatting during the scene writing phase. Use when the user wants to write a
screenplay from concept to pitch-ready draft. Do NOT use for writing prose
fiction (use creative writing skills), stage plays (different format), or
producing a film (this is writing only, not production planning).

metadata.author: wayland
metadata.depends: plot-outline character-development scene-writing screenplay-scene structural-editing story-pitch

name: write-technical-book
description:
Complete workflow for writing and publishing a technical book, from crafting a compelling proposal through building a detailed outline, writing and revising the manuscript, conducting technical review, and navigating the publishing process for both traditional and self-publishing paths.
Use when the user wants to write technical book or needs a structured multi-step process for this goal.
Do NOT use when the request is a single-step task or requires professional advice beyond educational guidance.
